_howto: Add one object per project. Required: tag (industry, geography), title, summary, metric, metricLabel. Optional: anonymous:true renders without the client name pressure, status:'placeholder' renders as a dashed coming-soon card. Run `node scripts/gencases.mjs` after editing.

cases.title: RockProsUSA: 13 quarries on one agentic dispatch system
cases.summary: Dispatch, invoicing and reporting moved onto agents across 13 quarry sites. Truck assignment proposed with its reasoning attached, invoices 3-way matched without a human pass, daily reports written by 6 AM. Cycle time fell 38% in the first quarter after cutover; 11,200 operations hours returned in year one.
cases.metricLabel: dispatch cycle time · 2,140 invoices, zero touches

cases.title: CitiSense: AI marketing & sales platform for agencies
cases.summary: An AI-enabled marketing and sales platform for advertising and creative agencies and display teams, campaign operations, sales workflows and reporting carried by agents so the creative teams do creative work.

cases.title: Freight reconciliation on agents
cases.summary: Every carrier bill line matched against weighbridge, gate and delivery data; clean lines cleared automatically, disputes queued with evidence bundles attached.

cases.title: AR follow-up: no account goes quiet
cases.summary: Receivables chased on cadence, escalated on rules; promises to pay tracked to their date and re-chased the morning after they break.
cases.metricLabel: measured monthly against the prior baseline

cases.title: AI-assisted image annotation platform
cases.summary: A labelling platform for machine-learning datasets: polygon and bounding-box tooling on canvas, with a detection model running in the browser to pre-annotate every image before a human touched it. Projects, datasets and team notifications built in; exports to Pascal-VOC XML and JSON. Four engineers, 117 commits, shipped in one quarter.
cases.metricLabel: human-plus-model labelling, five years before the hype

cases.title: Customer-experience SaaS, built and billed
cases.summary: The full commercial surface of a CX product: journey-mapping module, tiered pricing, Stripe and PayPal checkout, blog engine and a programmatic SEO service generating landing pages from a template. Front end, payments and content infrastructure delivered by one team.

cases.title: Edunomics Scholar: a two-sided scholarship marketplace
cases.summary: Donors publish scholarships, invite and review applicants and award grants; applicants build profiles, apply and track status, with a super-admin console over both sides. 33 API endpoints, token auth with password reset, document upload, transactional email and status workflows. Three years of continuous development.
cases.metricLabel: API endpoints · donor, applicant and admin surfaces

cases.title: Financial data pipelines
cases.summary: ETL scripts pulling, normalising and reconciling financial records into a single feed, the unglamorous plumbing that decides whether every dashboard above it is trustworthy.

cases.title: 33 more programmes being written up
cases.summary: The crawl of our own delivery history turned up 41 distinct programmes across 374 repositories, 2018 to 2026. We are writing them up in the same receipts-first format, and naming clients only where they have cleared it.
